entries.round: task:Execute Phase 4 tasks from tasks.md related to Authentication and Admin Scaffolding. 1. Install 'next-auth@beta' (NextAuth v5), 'bcryptjs', and 'lucide-react'. 2. Create 'auth.ts' and 'middleware.ts' for NextAuth configuration (Credentials provider using User model). 3. Create 'src/app/admin/layout.tsx' (sidebar, auth check) and 'src/app/admin/login/page.tsx' (login form). 4. Create the main dashboard 'src/app/admin/page.tsx'. Update tasks.md to check off NextAuth and Auth middleware. Use <write_file> tags.
